name: Stack Integration + Legal TTT + Parallel Muon
author: abaybektursun
blurb: Promoted 2026-03-28 submission folder for the byte-identical 2026-03-23 Stack Integration + Legal TTT + Parallel Muon script. Audited inherited three-seed legal_ttt evidence: mean val_bpb 1.119367 (std 0.000464), conservative max total submission size 15990006 bytes under the 16,000,000-byte cap. Launchability is closed via world_size:8, wallclock_cap with accepted 128 ms overshoot above 600000 ms, legal_ttt and non-TTT eval surfaces under the 600000 ms cap, local DATA_PATH/TOKENIZER_PATH defaults, and a script-specific no-network proof relative to data/cached_challenge_fineweb.py. The separate S04 random-map adapter folder remains non-record work and is not part of this submission evidence.
